root_text.sn45.42-47:1.1: “Sace vo, bhikkhave, aññatitthiyā paribbājakā evaṁ puccheyyuṁ:
root_text.sn45.42-47:1.2: ‘kimatthiyaṁ, āvuso, samaṇe gotame brahmacariyaṁ vussatī’ti, evaṁ puṭṭhā tumhe, bhikkhave, tesaṁ aññatitthiyānaṁ paribbājakānaṁ evaṁ byākareyyātha:
root_text.sn45.42-47:1.6: ‘āsavānaṁ khayatthaṁ kho, āvuso, bhagavati brahmacariyaṁ vussatī’ti …pe…

translation_text.sn45.42-47:0.2: 5. Abbreviated Texts on Followers of Other Religions
translation_text.sn45.42-47:0.3: Six Discourses on Giving Up Fetters, Etc.
translation_text.sn45.42-47:1.1: “Mendicants, if wanderers who follow another religion were to ask you:
translation_text.sn45.42-47:1.2: ‘Reverends, what’s the purpose of leading the spiritual life under the ascetic Gotama?’ You should answer them like this:
translation_text.sn45.42-47:1.3: ‘The purpose of leading the spiritual life under the Buddha is to give up the fetters.’ …
translation_text.sn45.42-47:1.5: ‘… to completely understand the course of time.’ …
translation_text.sn45.42-47:1.7: ‘… to realize the fruit of knowledge and freedom.’ …
